## 📋 Pull Request Summary

### 🎯 Type of Change
- [ ] 🐛 Bug fix (non-breaking change which fixes an issue)
- [ ] ✨ New feature (non-breaking change which adds functionality)
- [ ] 💥 Breaking change (fix or feature that would cause existing functionality to not work as expected)
- [ ] 📚 Documentation update
- [ ] 🎨 Style changes (formatting, missing semi colons, etc)
- [ ] ♻️ Code refactoring (no functional changes)
- [ ] ⚡ Performance improvements
- [ ] 🧪 Test updates
- [ ] 🔧 Build/CI changes

### 📝 Description
Brief description of changes made:

### 🔗 Related Issues
Fixes #(issue number)
Closes #(issue number)
Related to #(issue number)

### 🧪 Testing
- [ ] Unit tests pass
- [ ] Integration tests pass
- [ ] E2E tests pass (if applicable)
- [ ] Manual testing completed

**Test Coverage:**
- Backend: [percentage]%
- Frontend: [percentage]%

### 📱 Screenshots/GIFs (if applicable)
Add screenshots or GIFs of the changes:

### 🔍 Code Review Checklist

#### Backend (Laravel)
- [ ] Code follows Laravel conventions and standards
- [ ] Database migrations are reversible
- [ ] API endpoints are properly documented
- [ ] Validation rules are implemented
- [ ] Authorization checks are in place
- [ ] Error handling is implemented
- [ ] Tests are written and passing

#### Frontend (Vue + Quasar)
- [ ] Code follows Vue 3 composition API best practices
- [ ] Components are properly structured
- [ ] State management is properly implemented
- [ ] UI is responsive and accessible
- [ ] Performance considerations addressed
- [ ] Tests are written and passing

#### General
- [ ] Code is self-documenting with clear naming
- [ ] No console.log or dd() statements left in code
- [ ] Environment variables are used for configurations
- [ ] Security best practices followed
- [ ] Performance impact considered

### 🚀 Deployment Notes
Any special deployment considerations:
- [ ] Database migrations required
- [ ] Environment variables need updates
- [ ] Cache clearing required
- [ ] Third-party service configuration changes

### 📚 Documentation
- [ ] Code is properly commented
- [ ] API documentation updated (if applicable)
- [ ] README updated (if applicable)
- [ ] CHANGELOG updated

### 🎯 Sprint Information
- **Sprint:** [Sprint number and name]
- **Story Points:** [If applicable]
- **Milestone:** [Milestone name]

### 🔐 Security Considerations
- [ ] No sensitive data exposed
- [ ] Input validation implemented
- [ ] SQL injection prevention
- [ ] XSS prevention
- [ ] CSRF protection maintained

### 📊 Performance Impact
- [ ] No significant performance degradation
- [ ] Database queries optimized
- [ ] Frontend bundle size considered
- [ ] Caching strategies implemented (if applicable)

### 🤝 Reviewer Notes
Additional information for reviewers:

---

### 📋 Final Checklist
- [ ] Branch is up to date with base branch
- [ ] All tests are passing
- [ ] Code review is complete
- [ ] Documentation is updated
- [ ] Ready for merge
